calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Pursuant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp 1033.5 & Ccp685.040
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Willie James Thomas, defendant appeared in Propria Persona; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees is granted in the amount of $450. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Willie James Thomas, Defendant, appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Jul-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
